top_signals.title: Renewed Hormuz hostilities drive ECB rates rethin amid ‘extremely volatile’ outlook
top_signals.summary: Several consecutive days of strikes exchanged between the U.S. and Iran have cast uncertainty on the European Central Bank's interest rate decision next week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Managing Sino-American Interdependence
top_signals.summary: Only after World War II did trade become increasingly intraindustry, and now the U.S.-China economic relationship has gone further.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says IBM's 25% plunge isn't enough to make the stock a buy
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said IBM's sharp sell-off isn't enough to make the stock a buy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: South Korea to bring digital assets under new state asset management system
top_signals.summary: South Korea’s Economy ministryplans to include digital assets and intellectual property under the country’s new state-asset management framework.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
